Class Projectile

java.lang.Object
cz.cvut.fel.pjv.entities.Entity
cz.cvut.fel.pjv.weapons.Projectile
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Direct Known Subclasses:
Bullet, MeleeHitBox
public class Projectile extends Entity
The Projectile class represents any projectile in the game that affects entities and environment through collisions.

This class extends Entity and provides the basic structure and behaviors for projectiles, including properties related to collisions and damage application. It includes a utility method for resolving collisions with both blocks and entities.

See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • Projectile

      public Projectile(double x, double y, double width, double height, String texture, boolean destroyedByBlocks, boolean collidesWithEntities, boolean destroyAfterEntityCollision, ArrayList<Class<?>> collisionExempt)
      Constructs a new Projectile with the provided parameters.
      Parameters:
      x - the x-coordinate of the projectile.
      y - the y-coordinate of the projectile.
      width - the width of the projectile.
      height - the height of the projectile.
      texture - the texture identifier for rendering the projectile.
      destroyedByBlocks - determines if the projectile should be destroyed on collision with blocks.
      collidesWithEntities - indicates if the projectile should interact with other entities.
      destroyAfterEntityCollision - if true, the projectile destroys itself after colliding with an entity.
      collisionExempt - a list of entity classes to be exempted from collision detection.

  • Method Details

    • collisionResolver

      protected boolean collisionResolver(double damage)
      Ultimate Collision Resolver for projectiles Use inside @Override protected void resolveCollision(LevelManager levelManager)
